title: SELECT IN returns NULL instead of false when not found
key_bug_features: SELECT IN returns NULL for non-existent values
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT, name VARCHAR(50), value FLOAT, is_active BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Alice', 10.5, TRUE), (2, 'Bob', 20.0, FALSE), (3, 'Charlie', 30.0, TRUE);
SELECT 4 IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE is_active = TRUE);
SELECT 'Alice' IN (SELECT name FROM test_table WHERE value > 15.0);
SELECT NULL IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 2);
